message.content: {"problems":[{"number":8,"points":3,"problem_type":"multiple_choice","question":"$\\sin \\theta + 3 \\cos \\theta = 0$이고 $\\cos \\theta > 0$일 때, $\\sin \\theta$의 값은?","choices":["2","10","5","\\sqrt{10}","3\\sqrt{10}"]},{"number":9,"points":4,"problem_type":"multiple_choice","question":"양수 $a$에 대하여 함수 $f(x)$를 $$f(x) = x^2 + 3ax + 4$$라 하자. 직선 $y = 5$가 곡선 $y = f(x)$에 접할 때, $f(2)$의 값은?","choices":["11","12","13","14","15"]}]}
